revision.text: [[User:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}]] {{safesubst:toolbar|separator=dot |1=[[User talk:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|talk]] |2=[[Special:Contributions/{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|contribs]] |3=[[Special:DeletedContributions/{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|deleted contribs]] |4=[[Special:Log/spamblacklist/{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|blacklist hits]] |5=[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:AbuseLog&wpSearchUser={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}} AbuseLog] |6=[[Special:Whatlinkshere/User:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|what links to user page]] |7=[https://xtools.wmflabs.org/ec/en.wikipedia.org/{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|PATH}} count] |8=[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spam/UserReports/{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|COIBot]] |9=[https://spamcheck.toolforge.org/by-user?q={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|PATH}} Spamcheck] |10=[{{SERVER}}/wiki/Special:Log/?page=User:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}} user page logs] |11=[https://guc.toolforge.org/index.php?user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}&lang=en x-wiki] |12=[{{SERVER}}/w/index.php?title=Special:Listusers&limit=1&username={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}} status] |13=[{{SERVER}}/w/index.php?title=Special:AbuseLog&wpSearchUser={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}} Edit filter search] |14=[https://www.google.com/search?q={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}} Google] |15=[https://www.stopforumspam.com/search/{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}} StopForumSpam] }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
